program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define the acceptance gates that must pass before a C00 design brief packet can close RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane work as production_ready.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P00.M09.S02 in implemented state.

Adds c00_design_brief_acceptance_gate_definition with required gates for design brief categories, packet sections, files_for_review parity, severity/go-no-go policy, command evidence, actual Claude review, and construction inspection.
Extends the RP00 validator to enforce packet files_for_review parity against c00_design_brief_scope_inventory.required_evidence_inputs for the current subphase.
Updates the control-plane README with the C00 design brief acceptance gate scope.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not approve generated output, AI write behavior, H00 replacement, human-approval replacement, M09 completion, or RP00 completion.
Does not replace the actual C00 review; it defines acceptance gates that the actual review evidence must satisfy.
claude_questions: Does c00_design_brief_acceptance_gate_definition bind to RP00.P00.M09.S02 and define C00 design brief acceptance gates only?
Does it close the M09.S01 deferred P3 by enforcing packet.files_for_review parity with c00_design_brief_scope_inventory.required_evidence_inputs for the current subphase?

Are required acceptance gates sufficient for question categories, packet sections, severity policy, go/no-go policy, no-real-data/no-write evidence, actual Claude review, P0/P1/P2 handling, construction inspection, and next boundary?
Does the implementation avoid claims of production mutation, real-data import, generation output approval, H00 or human replacement, M09 completion, or RP00 completion?
risk_focus: Acceptance gates listed without machine enforcement.
Packet/evidence parity drifting from the contract scope inventory.
C00 design brief acceptance gates replacing actual C00 review authority.
